data.title: PAR Technology Corporation Announces Release Date and Conference Call Information for 2026 First Quarter Financial Results
data.description: PAR Technology Corporation (NYSE: PAR) disclosed plans to unveil its Q1 financial outcomes on May 7, 2026, at 4:00 p.m. ET, accompanied by an investor presentation and conference call at 4:30 p.m. ET. The earnings call will be broadcast live via webcast, available on the PAR Technology Investor Relations webpage at http://www.partech.com/investor-relations/.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Nasdaq Rides 10-Day Win Streak On Iran Hopes; Nvidia, Google In Buy Areas
data.description: For 10 consecutive days, both the Nasdaq and Nvidia have seen a significant rally. In addition, notable companies such as chip giant ASML and Bank of America have exceeded expectations. Amid optimism surrounding Iran, Nasdaq futures are looking positive, with both Nvidia and Google showing promising buy signals. This update was brought to you by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: In HelloNation, Insurance Agency Coaching Expert Andrew Filar Examines Internet Lead Conversion
data.description: This report highlights the positive impact of implementing structured lead-handling systems and coaching in enhancing follow-up accountability for insurance agencies. The city mentioned is Sandy Springs, Georgia, and the article is dated April 23, 2026. It emphasizes the challenges faced by insurance agencies in converting internet leads. These strategies have shown to support long-term growth and success for such businesses.

data.title: CertiK forecasts rise in crypto hacks by 2026 due to phishing, deepfakes, and AI; predicting significant threats.
data.description: In the year 2026, CertiK forecasts that significant cryptocurrency hacks will arise due to deepfakes, phishing, and cross-chain vulnerabilities. It is projected that these emerging threats will be driven by the increasing use of AI technology, which will play a dual role in both assisting malicious activities and helping to counteract them.

data.title: First Community Announces $1 Million Commitment to Alief ISD
data.description: A credit union based in Houston, First Community Credit Union, recently made a significant announcement on April 23, 2026, revealing their long-term commitment of $1 million to Alief Independent School District (Alief ISD). This generous investment showcases the credit union's strong support for education, local community, and the families within it.

data.title: In HelloNation, Painting Expert Michael Moore of Sandy Springs Discusses Ceramic and Reflective Coatings for Energy Efficiency
data.description: In Sandy Springs, Georgia on April 23, 2026, the energy efficiency advantages of ceramic and reflective coatings were discussed in an article by HelloNation. The piece included input from Painting Expert Michael Moore affiliated with Rhino Shield by Georgia Coatings, Inc. Moore detailed the benefits of these coatings in terms of energy efficiency in buildings.

data.title: Private Equity Giant Blackstone's AUM Hits Record $1.3 Trillion
data.description: Blackstone Inc. (NYSE: BX) saw a decrease in shares on Thursday following the release of their first-quarter results, which surpassed expectations. Distributable earnings per share rose to $1.36, a 25% increase from the previous year, exceeding the analyst estimate of $1.35. Total distributable earnings also rose by 25% to $1.76 billion. Segment revenue experienced a 24% climb to $3.433 billion, surpassing the expected $3.397 billion. Fee-related earnings increased by 23% to $1.55 billion. In specific segments, fee-related earnings grew by 13% in real estate, decreased by 4% in credit and insurance, surged by 59% in private equity, and rose by 28% in multi-asset investing. Net accrued performance revenue rose to $7.0 billion from $6.4 billion year-over-year. Assets under management grew by 12% to $1.30 trillion, attributed to inflows of $68.5 billion during the quarter. The company also announced a quarterly dividend of $1.16 per share, payable on May 11 to shareholders of record as of May 4.

data.title: West Pharmaceutical Lifts Annual Guidance After Strong GLP-1 Driven Growth In Q1
data.description: Shares of West Pharmaceutical Services, Inc. (NYSE: WST) experienced a significant increase following the release of their first-quarter 2026 earnings report, which exceeded analyst expectations. The company reported adjusted earnings of $2.13 per share, surpassing the consensus of $1.68. Net sales also saw a strong growth of 21% year over year, reaching $844.90 million, with organic growth at 15.3%, higher than the expected $779.97 million. Proprietary Products sales totaled $694.3 million, showing a growth of 23.3% and a 17.5% increase organically. HVP components, comprising 48% of the company's total net sales, remained a key driver of growth. Specifically, HVP components rose by 23% organically, driven by robust performance in both GLP-1 and GLP.

data.title: EXCLUSIVE: Ross Gerber Says He's A 'Tesla Lover, Elon Critic' – Why He Sees Himself As The Tesla Hero And Not A Villain
data.description: Ross Gerber, CEO and co-founder of Gerber Kawasaki, is notable for his views on Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA). Despite changes in his stance on Tesla and CEO Elon Musk, Gerber does not view himself as a Tesla Villain. According to Benzinga, he believes he could be the hero Tesla needs. The AdvisorShares Gerber Kawasaki ETF (NYSE: GK) no longer includes Tesla shares, with Gerber's critiques of the company and Musk intensifying lately. However, he asserts he is far from being a villain, as Gerber Kawasaki still maintains Tesla shares. In an exclusive interview with Benzinga, Gerber stated, "I'm actually the Tesla Hero who truly cares about the real Tesla, the Tesla we helped build." He defended the company and Musk in numerous television appearances, especially during the Solar City acquisition and funding controversies. Read the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: WellBe Senior Medical Strengthens Leadership Team with Four New Members
data.description: WellBe Senior Medical, based in Chicago, made an announcement on April 23, 2026, regarding the addition of four new members to its leadership team. This decision is part of the company's strategic expansion plan as they aim to enhance their personalized, in-home medical care services nationwide. This comes as WellBe aims to scale its operations and reach a wider audience.

data.title: MGIC Investment Corporation Announces Additional $750 Million Share Repurchase Program and Quarterly Dividend of $0.15 Per Share
data.description: In Milwaukee on April 23, 2026, MGIC Investment Corporation (NYSE: MTG) revealed their new share repurchase program. The board of directors has sanctioned the repurchase of up to $750 million worth of its common stock. This move allows the company to buy back shares, demonstrating confidence in its financial standing.

data.title: Leading U.S. Fertility Network Expands Access to Care in South Carolina with the Opening of CCRM Fertility of Greenville
data.description: Two esteemed doctors, Dr. Creighton Likes and Dr. Rachel Beverley, have joined the Greenville community in South Carolina, bringing their valuable clinical and scientific expertise. On April 23, 2026, CCRM Fertility (CCRM), a renowned fertility clinic network in the United States, marked the inauguration of its latest location in Greenville. This expansion is significant as it adds to the growing network of CCRM facilities across the country, further enhancing access to fertility services. Dr. Likes and Dr. Beverley's arrival is expected to bolster the local healthcare landscape and offer advanced fertility treatments to individuals in the area.

data.title: Diablo Canyon 2045 Coalition Launches to Protect California's Renewable Energy Transition & Lower Costs for Customers
data.description: A coalition consisting of 25 organizations is urging California legislators to approve a bill in 2026 that would prolong the operation of the Diablo Canyon Power Plant until 2045. The organizations include clean energy advocates, labor unions, businesses, and various influential figures. The call was made in Sacramento, California, on April 23, 2026.

data.title: Wilks Development Welcomes Three New Retail Tenants at Firefly Park
data.description: Continued leasing activity remains strong at the Shops at Firefly Park in FRISCO, Texas, with phase-one retail now exceeding 40% ahead of its scheduled debut in Fall 2027. Wilks Development revealed that popular brands Frenchie, Woodhouse Spa, and Second Rodeo Brewing are set to join TYLER'S at the shopping center. This announcement indicates positive growth for the project and showcases its appeal to various tenants.
